name: Matthew Brown
summary: Former government analyst who publicly associated himself with allegations concerning an alleged program called Immaculate Constellation.
profileSummary: Former government analyst who publicly associated himself with allegations concerning an alleged program called Immaculate Constellation.
background: Self-described former Defense and State Department analyst.
inclusionNote: Included because he has publicly identified himself and given extended on-the-record interviews. His central allegations remain unverified publicly.
